data.title: Brother Machi's account turned a profit during the week, with contract profits turning positive.
data.description: Hyperbot data shows that Brother Machi turned a profit in the past week, with his weekly total PnL for contracts turning positive, recording a profit of approximately $214,800, with a win rate of 80%. His current total account assets are approximately $1.25 million, and he currently holds long contracts on ETH with 25x leverage and long contracts on HYPE with 10x leverage, with a total contract value of approximately $24.72 million. Although individual positions still show unrealized losses, the overall curve has clearly recovered within the week.

data.title: Following the news of a new product launch on Upbit, YB briefly surged above 0.47 USDT, with a 24-hour increase exceeding 11%.

Trading volume also increased significantly, with approximately 1.457 million YB traded in the past 24 hours, amounting to approximately 610,000 USDT.

data.title: Lithuania Sets Deadline for Crypto Service Licensing
data.description: According to Odaily, the Lithuanian central bank, Lietuvos Bankas, has issued a warning that starting January 1, 2026, all entities providing crypto asset-related services locally must possess a MiCA license. Failure to comply will be considered illegal. The transition period ends on December 31, 2025, and non-compliant platforms may face fines, website bans, and in severe cases, criminal charges with a maximum penalty of four years imprisonment. Regulators have advised businesses not intending to continue operations to exit orderly and manage user assets responsibly. Currently, out of over 370 registered crypto companies in Lithuania, only about 30 have applied for the license.

data.title: Trust Wallet Users Advised to Secure Assets Amid Security Concerns
data.description: According to Foresight News, SlowMist's Chief Information Security Officer, 23pds, has issued a warning to users affected by certain versions of Trust Wallet. He advised these users to disconnect from the internet before exporting their mnemonic phrases to transfer assets. This precaution is necessary to prevent asset theft when opening the wallet online. Users with mnemonic phrase backups are urged to transfer their assets before upgrading the wallet.

data.title: Trust Wallet Compromise: Binance to Reimburse $7M via SAFU
data.description:
Trust Wallet's extension vulnerability leads to $7 million in losses. Binance commits to reimbursing users using SAFU funds. Investigation ongoing.
source: https://coincu.com/news/trust-wallet-extension-vulnerability/

data.title: Ethereum unlikely to reach new highs in 2026: Ben Cowen
data.description:
If Ether manages to reclaim its all-time high in 2026, it may just be a “bull trap,” says crypto analyst Ben Cowen.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/ether-price-new-highs-2026-unlikely-ben-cowen-crypto-analyst?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
